def positive_thread_pool_or_process_pool_created_and_destroyed_per_call():
    rule_id = "thread_pool_or_process_pool_created_and_destroyed_per_call"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag per-call executor allocation for repeatable work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
